---
name: Feature request
about: A behaviour or API addition you'd like the framework to support
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## What behaviour you want

Describe the API or behaviour. A code sketch of how it would be used
is more useful than a prose description.

```python
# how you imagine using it
```

## What use case it unlocks

What design or workflow becomes possible (or simpler) with this
feature. If it's a real design you're trying to build, name the parts
involved.

## What currently doesn't work

Either the workaround you're using today, or the specific failure
mode you hit trying to do this without the feature.
